texto: Contratos inteligentes agregados y vinculados a todo el sistema

🔄 DirecCoin moved to a new home

Dear community,

DirecCoin has been migrated to a new 100% free and permanent server. This ensures the network will be active 24/7 with no interruptions or hidden costs.

⚠️ However, during migration, mining files could not be transferred. This means:

• Previously mined blocks were reset
• Accounts created before June 12 need a new wallet
• The blockchain starts from scratch, faster and more efficient

✅ What did NOT change:
• The marketplace, lottery, P2P and announcements are working
• The public API is active
• The direccoin.org domain with SSL remains the same

🙏 Thank you for your understanding. This change ensures DirecCoin is sustainable forever. Let's mine this new era together.

— The DirecCoin creator
Sistema P2P próximamente listo, al igual que sistema de gobernanza, si estás interesado en difundir y participar en el desarrollo del proyecto manda Gmail a direccoin2026@gmail.com

¡Participa y Gana! En la lotería Direccoin, bolsa acumulativa que te puede dar increíbles premios.

Join and Win! In the DirecCoin lottery, the jackpot pool can give you incredible prizes.

¡Esta criptomoneda es suya, hagámosla crecer! Totalmente descentralizada, incluso con tecnología que permite minar desde cualquier dispositivo (PoUC) y un marketplace rápido y sin trabas. ¡Agregaré más funciones próximamente! Ayuden a DirecCoin a crecer, Bienvenidos 

This cryptocurrency is yours, let's make it grow! Fully decentralized, with technology that lets you mine from any device (PoUC) and a fast, hassle-free marketplace. I'll be adding more features soon! Help DirecCoin grow
